mapper.sql: c."id", c."creator_id", c."creation_time", c."modifier_id", c."modification_time", c."conversation_id", c."title", c."deleted"
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM "conversation" WHERE "creator_id" = #{userId} AND "deleted" = FALSE
AND "title" ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE "conversation" SET "title" = #{title}, "modifier_id" = #{userId}, "modification_time" = NOW() WHERE "conversation_id" = #{conversationId} AND "creator_id" = #{userId} AND "deleted" = FALSE
UPDATE "conversation" SET "deleted" = TRUE, "modifier_id" = #{userId}, "modification_time" = NOW() WHERE "conversation_id" = #{conversationId} AND "creator_id" = #{userId} AND "deleted" = FALSE
